text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, the debut race, where buds of e-moe-tion sprout. I wonder how everyone will fare...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Alas, amidst such pristine purity, this bud called
Digitan is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At severe risk of overhydration! I'm drowning in
moe! Look around, Trainer! Everywhere you look,
Umas abound.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Some shake with nervousness, while others have
ambition sparkling in their eyes...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each of them is gripped by that eager
nervousness reserved for inexperienced youth as
they prepare to run their once-in-a-lifetime debut
race. What a divine occasion I find myself mixed
up in!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Oh man, can divinity kill? Is this what it's like to be smitten? So be it... The heavens can smite me where I stand, and I'll die happ—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That's right! I can't let the heavens take me yet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is my time to stand with the other fledglings.
If by any chance I were to cast a shadow on this
precious day, why I... I'd...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No, I'll run! With this overabundance of
sustenance, my power is unlimited.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My eyes are cameras, here to document this
once-in-a-lifetime event! I will capture their tears
of joy as well as their perspiration of anguish and
burn the images into my memory! Guehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Underlying motives aside, Agnes Digital heads off
to the race with a bona fide determination that
can't be ignored.
